ddls:
CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "arn" TEXT /* ARN of the application */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the application belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* Number of downloads */,
  "ratings" REAL /* Average rating */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the application repository */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES application_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the skill */,
  "arn" TEXT /* ARN of the skill */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the skill belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the skill */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* Number of downloads */,
  "ratings" REAL /* Average rating */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the skill repository */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the skill was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the skill was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skills_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES skill_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application being deployed */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill being deployed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user deploying the application or skill */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date of deployment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the deployment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the deployment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployments_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployments_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application being tracked */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill being tracked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being tracked */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Type of metric being tracked (e.g., downloads, ratings) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skill_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application being tagged */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_tags_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skill_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill being tagged */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skill_tags_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application being reviewed */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user reviewing */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application being versioned */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the application */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_versions_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skill_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill being versioned */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the skill */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skill_versions_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_skill_relations" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relation */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_skill_relations_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_skill_relations_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_skill_relations" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_skill_relations_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_skill_relations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_application_relations" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_application_relations_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_application_relations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
